case_title: OPUS VENTURES, INC. VS. FAUSTUS COMPANY et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPUS VENTURES, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FAUSTUS COMPANY PETERSON, PAUL E PETERSON, URSULA MAJOR WORLD TRADE INC.
